normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a : Array Int) (n : Nat), n = a.size → True
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The function is called with a mutable slice backed by an array of integers; no additional numeric preconditions are required.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∃ (measure : Nat), (∀ state, step state decreases measure) → FunctionTerminates
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The insertion-sort loop(s) terminate (e.g., by a decreasing measure such as the index of the outer loop and/or the inner loop).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a₀ : Array Int) (a₁ : Array Int), runInsertionSort a₀ = a₁ → (∀ i, i < a₀.size → True) ∧ a₁.size = a₀.size
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The algorithm only permutes elements within the slice; it does not change the length of the slice.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a₀ a₁ : Array Int), runInsertionSort a₀ = a₁ → Multiset.of (a₁.toList) = Multiset.of (a₀.toList)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Insertion sort preserves the multiset of elements: the output is a permutation of the input.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a : Array Int) (i : Nat), 0 ≤ i ∧ i ≤ a.size → (afterOuterLoop i) → Sorted (fun j => a[j]) (lo := 0) (hi := i)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: After processing the first i elements (outer loop), the prefix [0, i) is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a₀ : Array Int) (a : Array Int) (i : Nat), afterOuterLoop i → Multiset.of (a.toList.take i) = Multiset.of (a₀.toList.take i)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: During the outer loop, the elements in the processed prefix are a permutation of the corresponding original prefix.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a : Array Int) (i j : Nat), afterInnerLoop i j → (Sorted (fun k => a[k]) (lo := j+1) (hi := i+1)) ∧ (∀ k, j+1 ≤ k ∧ k ≤ i → a[k] ≥ a[j])
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: While inserting the element at position i into the sorted prefix, the portion to the right of the current hole remains sorted, and elements are shifted appropriately.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a₀ a : Array Int) (i j : Nat), afterInnerLoop i j → Multiset.of (a.toList.take (i+1)) = Multiset.of (a₀.toList.take (i+1))
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The inner loop preserves the multiset of the elements within the range affected by insertion (up to i).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (i j : Nat), afterInnerLoop i j → j ≤ i ∧ j < a.size
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Index variables used by the inner loop stay within valid bounds of the slice.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a₀ a₁ : Array Int), runInsertionSort a₀ = a₁ → Sorted (fun i => a₁[i]) (lo := 0) (hi := a₁.size)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: After completion, the entire slice is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a₀ a₁ : Array Int), runInsertionSort a₀ = a₁ → Multiset.of (a₁.toList) = Multiset.of (a₀.toList)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: After completion, the output is a permutation of the input (no elements lost or created).
